level1.text: Online learning offers flexibility for students to manage their time effectively.
Firstly, students can access materials anytime which increases learning autonomy.
Moreover, digital platforms provide interactive tools that maintain engagement.
Therefore, wider implementation of online learning will enhance outcomes if supported properly.

level2.text: Schools should reduce paper usage to support sustainability.
Recycling bins in every class decreased waste volume by 25% last semester.
Many assignments can be submitted digitally without reducing quality of feedback.
A survey of 300 students shows 72% prefer digital handouts.
Providing tablets for worksheets will cut printing costs in the long term.
The school must provide healthier canteen options.
Nutrition guidelines recommend reducing sugar and trans fat in students' meals.
Healthier meals can improve students' concentration and energy levels.
In 2024, School Y reported 18% fewer sick days after menu improvements.
Extending canteen hours helps students with tight schedules.

level3.text: (Modal) Students __ develop digital literacy to succeed in modern workplaces.
(Conjunction) __, schools need strong internet to run blended learning.
(Evaluative) It is __ that practical projects enhance problem-solving.
(Simple Present) Career guidance __ students choose suitable pathways.
(Modal) Schools __ provide internships for vocational students.
(Conjunction) __, not all students have devices; lending programs are needed.
(Evaluative) It is __ that teacher training improves classroom technology use.
